root_cause: Volume mount failed due to permission denied on the node
evidence: FailedMount or MountVolume event contains permission denied
Pod is assigned to node node1

causes.message: Kubelet attempted to set up and mount a volume for the Pod
Node-side volume setup or mount failed with permission denied
Pod cannot complete volume setup and start normally

pod:secure-volume-pod: Kubelet reported volume mount permission denial
MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "data": mkdir /var/lib/kubelet/pods/1111-2222/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/data/mount: permission denied
node:node1: Volume setup or mount on the node failed with permission denied
pvc:data-pvc: PVC is Bound but mount/setup was denied

likely_causes: NFS export or backing filesystem denied the node mount operation
Volume path ownership or mode on the node is incompatible with kubelet setup
CSI driver mount target directory permissions are incorrect
SELinux or node-side security policy blocked the mount or chmod/chown step
suggested_checks: Inspect kubelet logs on the node for mount permission errors
Verify node-side mount path ownership, permissions, and security policy
Check backing storage export permissions and fsGroup or securityContext settings
